value.stringValue: Thank you for submitting an RFP Request
Commercial RFP Team: Project Ready for Qualification
Thank You For Submitting an RFP Support Request

Flow.description: v11 - added support for GPS send email to SE
Flow.interviewLabel: RFP Cheetah Team: Project Creation Email {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Send Email on Project Creation

textTemplates.name: ttEmail_Commercial_SelfService_Q_SE
textTemplates.text:
Hello,


RFP Project {!$Record.Name} has just been created in Avnio. 


Because this RFP has an opportunity less than $200K, is an unanticipated RFP, or the turnaround time for the proposal is less than 5 business days from today, this RFP is only eligible for self service.


You can use the Library Search in Avnio to find responses to questions within your RFP. 


Additionally, you can visit the RFP page on Solutions Central for links to our additional resources and templates. 


If you have further questions, reference our slack channel: #q-branch-rfp


Thank you!

textTemplates.description: email body for the 'dsr creation required' email
textTemplates.name: ttEmail_Commercial_Supported_Q
textTemplates.text:
Hello RFP Intake,


Project {!$Record.Name} has just been created in Avnio. Review for initial intake criteria and route to the appropriate team.


Project/DSR Details

Project Link: {!$Record.avnio__ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.avnio__DueDate__c}

Region/Business Unit: {!$Record.Region_Business_Unit__c}

Existing Customer: {!$Record.Existing_Customer__c}

Blind Ask: {!$Record.Blind_Ask__c}

Big Bet / Strategic Account: {!$Record.Big_Bet_Strategic_Account__c}

SE: {!$Record.SE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.SE__r.LastName}

Salesforce Account Team: {!$Record.Other_Salesforce_employees_involved__c}

Red Flags/Current Issues: {!$Record.Red_Flags_Current_Issues__c}

Additional Details: {!$Record.Additional_Details__c}

Product Selection: {!$Record.Product_Type__c}


Thank you!

textTemplates.name: ttEmail_Commercial_Supported_SE
textTemplates.text:
Thank you for submitting your request for assistance to the Q RFP Team. Our review and qualification process differs by region and product. After an internal review of the request and RFP, you will receive a response within 24 hours determining the level of support the RFP Team can provide, based on team capacity, deal size, functional fit, and due date.


You can find an overview of our process and additional RFP materials on our Solutions Central Page


Avnio Project: {!$Record.avnio__ProjectName__c}


Due Date: {!$Record.avnio__DueDate__c}

Red Flags: {!$Record.Red_Flags_Current_Issues__c}

textTemplates.name: ttEmail_Salesforce_org_Original
textTemplates.text:
Dear RFP Team,


Project {!$Record.Name} has just been created in Avnio. Review for initial intake criteria and route to the appropriate RFP Specialist for processing.


Project Details

Project Link: {!$Record.avnio__ProjectName__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.avnio__DueDate__c}

Unanticipated RFP?: {!$Record.Blind_Ask__c}

Existing Customer: {!$Record.Existing_Customer__c}

Big Bet / Strategic Account: {!$Record.Big_Bet_Strategic_Account__c}

SE: {!$Record.SE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.SE__r.LastName}

Salesforce Account Team: {!$Record.Other_Salesforce_employees_involved__c}

Red Flags/Current Issues: {!$Record.Red_Flags_Current_Issues__c}

Product Selection: {!$Record.Product_Type__c}


Thank you!

textTemplates.name: ttEmail_Salesforce_org_SelfService_Q_AE
textTemplates.text:
Thank you for engaging the Salesforce.org RFP Team.


RFP Project {!$Record.Name} has been created in Avnio. 


Based on the guidelines we used to determine the priority assigned to support requests, we have categorized this opportunity as Self Service, where the Sales Team is responsible for all aspects of the response.


Please visit Salesforce.org RFP Central Spot and #sfdo-rfp-support Slack channel where you will find tools, templates, and more to assist you in completing proposal responses.


Good luck in the next stage. We look forward to working with you again in the future!


Regards,

Salesforce.org RFP Team

textTemplates.name: ttEmail_Salesforce_org_Supported_Q_AE
textTemplates.text:
Thank you for engaging the Salesforce.org RFP Team.


RFP Project {!$Record.Name} has been created in Avnio. 


You will receive a response within one business day determining the level of support the RFP Team can provide, based on capacity and due date. In the meantime, please be sure to do the following:

  1. If you haven't already, complete the Go/No Go Scorecard that is now integrated into your RFP Project.
  2. Ask your assigned SE to review and provide comments on the Go/No Go Scorecard.
  3. @Mention your RVP in the Project Chatter requesting their review and approval of the Go/No Go Scorecard.
  4. Request any additional approvals if prompted by the Project notification system.

Visit Salesforce.org RFP Central Spot and #sfdo-rfp-support Slack channel where you can learn more about our team and gain access to RFP Response tools and templates.


Regards,

Salesforce.org RFP Team

textTemplates.description: Email to SE to process SE portion of GNG
textTemplates.name: ttEmailPublicSectorSESupport
textTemplates.text:
RFP Project {!$Record.Name} has been created in Avnio. 


You have received this email since you are the SE on the project record. Please access the Avnio org and complete the SE portion of the Go-No-Go Process for the {!$Record.Name} Project. This is associated to the opportunity: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name__c}



Regards,

Global Public Sector RFP Team
